---
title: "Output Pipelines"
format: html
---

The Deep Learning widget uses an Output Pipeline section for each model output.
This section shows how the model tensor is converted into a saved data object.

For NeuroSAM, the probability map output defaults to `TensorToMask2D`, producing
`MaskData`.

For General Encoder models, spatial feature maps default to:

```text
Global Average Pool -> TensorToFeatureVector
```

This produces a `TensorData` table with one row per frame and one column per
embedding dimension. The widget only offers compatible next steps, and an output
pipeline must end in a decoder before inference can run.
